title: hieracium circumstellatum
intro: Hieracium circumstellatum, also known as the sticky hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow dandelion-like flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium circumstellatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infection. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
